title: ConsciousnessResult
description: Output of the field classifier for a single field case fixture. Documents computed C-score, classification, G-status, and preserved breaks. G / givenness is the primitive residue — this result does not claim to detect G directly.

case_id.description: ID of the fixture being classified.

c_score.description: Computed C = G·U·D·T·F. null if any required component is null. 0.0 if any is 0.

c_score_status.description: How the C score was produced.

g_status.description: Status of G (givenness). The harness cannot detect G directly. g_contested = case is genuinely contested in the literature. g_unresolvable = cannot classify with any available tool.

components_computed.description: Component scores as used in computation. G is used if present; A (legacy) is used if G is absent.

collapsed_components.description: Which components collapsed to 0.0, causing C to collapse.

null_components.description: Which components are null, making C unresolvable.

false_positive_risk.description: Risk that the theory incorrectly promotes this case. critical = G > 0 assigned to a non-phenomenal case.

revision_pressure.description: What this result puts pressure on in the theory.

breaks_preserved.description: Theory breaks from this classification. Must not be patched.
